/ 01 — About

Form is
language.

I am an automotive and transportation designer with a focus on exterior concept development and high-performance electric vehicle architecture. My work bridges speculative vision and production feasibility.

Trained at Coventry University and the Royal College of Art, I approach each concept with equal rigour applied to proportion, surface language, and the narrative a vehicle communicates at standstill and in motion. The MHD1 Aston Martin concept represents the culmination of that philosophy.

Design philosophy

"Form is the argument. Surface is the sentence. Proportion is the punctuation."
